settingsWorkspace.title: Manage your protection preferences
settingsWorkspace.description: Configure protection boundaries, accountability relationships, and privacy settings from one place.
settingsWorkspace.boundaryBody: Device-level protection settings are managed from the installed app. This page connects you to accountability and privacy features.
settingsWorkspace.deviceBody: The app runs as a background service on your device. Sensitivity and blocking rules are configured in the installed client.
settingsWorkspace.accountabilityBody: Connect with a trusted person who can approve protection changes and support your recovery commitment.
settingsWorkspace.privacyBody: Export your data or request account deletion in compliance with privacy regulations.
settingsWorkspace.helpBody: Submit a support ticket or access setup guides for the Gamblock-AI protection system.
settingsWorkspace.operatorHelpBody: Access the Gamblock-AI client setup guide. Self-service support tickets are available only to student and partner accounts.
settingsWorkspace.syncBody: Check-ins are stored in your account so they are available across devices. You can also choose whether to sync your recovery plan.
settingsWorkspace.syncIntentionsBody: Your active recovery plan is sent to your account when connected.
settingsWorkspace.syncPrivateNote: Turning sync off stops future changes from being sent, but does not delete an account copy that was already stored. Journals use separate storage settings.
settingsWorkspace.syncErrorTitle: The active plan has not synced yet
settingsWorkspace.syncErrorBody: The preference remains enabled and future changes will be retried. Check your connection or retry now.

supportWorkspace.title: Get help with the protection system
supportWorkspace.description: Choose the right person to help: your trusted partner or the Gamblock-AI team.
supportWorkspace.partnerChannelBody: Send a structured signal to your connected partner.
supportWorkspace.teamChannelBody: Create a ticket for technical, device recovery, accountability, or privacy support.
supportWorkspace.partnerErrorTitle: Partner requests could not be loaded
supportWorkspace.partnerErrorBody: Check your session and connection, then try again.
supportWorkspace.partnerUnavailableBody: Contact requests can only be sent to a partner who is connected and has accepted the relationship.
supportWorkspace.partnerFormTitle: Ask your partner to contact you
supportWorkspace.partnerFormBody: Send a short signal without opening an operator ticket or sharing private recovery notes.
supportWorkspace.partnerMessagePlaceholder: Share a comfortable time or contact method...
supportWorkspace.partnerMessageHelp: The note is shared only with the related partner. Do not include passwords, tokens, URLs, domains, or browsing history.
supportWorkspace.partnerContactSuccess: The contact request was sent to your partner.
supportWorkspace.partnerContactError: The contact request could not be updated.
supportWorkspace.partnerBoundaryBody: This request is visible only to you and the related partner. The Gamblock-AI team does not receive this conversation.
supportWorkspace.partnerHistoryBody: See whether a request is waiting, acknowledged, or completed.
supportWorkspace.partnerHistoryEmptyBody: New requests will appear here without being mixed with Gamblock-AI team tickets.
supportWorkspace.incomingContactBody: Respond to contact signals from members without opening their private recovery data.

contactActionSuccess.acknowledged: The request was marked as acknowledged.
contactActionSuccess.closed: The request was marked as completed.
contactActionSuccess.escalated: The request was marked for follow-up.

supportWorkspace.privacyBody: Support tickets contain only the details you enter. Reports never attach browsing history automatically.
supportWorkspace.formBody: Describe the issue you are experiencing. Our team will respond within 24 hours.
supportWorkspace.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the technical issue you are facing (mention OS/browser type if relevant)...
supportWorkspace.descriptionHelp: Do not include URLs, domains, passwords, tokens, or browsing history. The system rejects detected sensitive fields.
supportWorkspace.success: Your support ticket was created! Our technical team will respond within 24 hours.
supportWorkspace.safeReportBody: Support tickets are handled by the technical team only. Your browsing history is never included.
supportWorkspace.historyBody: Previous support tickets and their statuses will appear here.
supportWorkspace.historyPageBody: Review all of your support tickets, ordered from newest to oldest.
supportWorkspace.historyBoundary: No support tickets yet. New tickets will appear here.
supportWorkspace.historyError: Ticket history could not be loaded.
supportWorkspace.urgentBody: If the situation feels hard to manage alone, contact someone you trust or call a crisis helpline.
supportWorkspace.threadPrivacyBody: Ticket content and replies are encrypted before storage. Do not send passwords, tokens, URLs, domains, or browsing history.
supportWorkspace.conversationBody: Support replies and your updates stay in one history.
supportWorkspace.replyPlaceholder: Add relevant information without sensitive data...
supportWorkspace.ticketActionsBody: Close a completed ticket or reopen it within seven days after resolution.

profileWorkspace.title: Your account information
profileWorkspace.description: Update your display name and manage security settings for your Gamblock-AI account.
profileWorkspace.sessionBody: Your session is protected by an encrypted token. Sign out from devices you no longer use.
profileWorkspace.identityBody: Your display name and account email. The email address cannot be changed from this page.
profileWorkspace.avatarBody: Choose a photo, adjust its frame, then save it as your square profile image.
profileWorkspace.avatarCropBody: The result is saved as a 512 × 512 square WebP image.
profileWorkspace.avatarUploadError: The profile photo could not be updated.
profileWorkspace.avatarRemoveError: The profile photo could not be removed.
profileWorkspace.avatarSourceTooLarge: Choose an image no larger than 8 MB.
profileWorkspace.displayNameHelp: This name is shown in the dashboard and to your accountability partner.
profileWorkspace.emailReadonly: Email address is managed by the authentication provider and cannot be changed here.
profileWorkspace.saveError: The display name could not be saved.
profileWorkspace.profileLoadErrorTitle: The latest profile data could not be loaded
profileWorkspace.profileLoadErrorBody: Local information remains visible. Reload it before changing account security settings.
profileWorkspace.securityBody: Change your password by verifying the current one. All refresh tokens are revoked after a successful change.
profileWorkspace.securityUnavailableBody: Reload the profile so the system can confirm the account's sign-in method before offering a password change.
profileWorkspace.providerSecurityBody: This account does not have a Gamblock-AI password. Use your Google Account security settings to manage sign-in methods.
profileWorkspace.newPasswordMinimum: The new password must be at least 8 characters.
profileWorkspace.passwordMismatch: The password confirmation does not match.
profileWorkspace.passwordMustDiffer: The new password must be different from the current password.
profileWorkspace.passwordSignOutNote: After the update, you will be signed out and must sign in again with the new password.
profileWorkspace.passwordUpdateSuccess: Password updated successfully. Sign in again with your new password.
profileWorkspace.accountTruthBody: Your account data is stored securely. Use the data requests page to export or delete your data.

dataRequestsWorkspace.title: Your data, your control
dataRequestsWorkspace.description: Export your activity history or request account deletion in compliance with privacy regulations.
dataRequestsWorkspace.privacyBody: All data requests follow the data-minimisation principle. Browsing history is never included because it never leaves your device.
dataRequestsWorkspace.localDataBody: Detection logs and browsing data exist only on your device. Server-side data includes account identity, protection events, and recovery entries.
dataRequestsWorkspace.exportBody: Download your protection activity archives, ruleset sync history, and recovery entries in standard JSON/ZIP format.
dataRequestsWorkspace.deleteBody: Permanently deletes your account identity on our servers. This action requires email confirmation and cannot be undone.
dataRequestsWorkspace.exportSuccess: The data export request was submitted and is processing.
dataRequestsWorkspace.exportReady: Your data export is ready to download from request history.
dataRequestsWorkspace.deleteSuccess: Account deletion request submitted. Check your email for confirmation.
dataRequestsWorkspace.requestError: Failed to process your request. Please try again.
dataRequestsWorkspace.historyBody: Track the status of your data export and deletion requests.
dataRequestsWorkspace.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.
dataRequestsWorkspace.emptyBody: Requests you submit will appear here with their status.
dataRequestsWorkspace.deleteDialogBody: This action is irreversible. All your server-side data will be permanently removed.
dataRequestsWorkspace.deleteScopeBody: Account identity, protection events, recovery entries, and partner relationships. Local device data is not affected.
dataRequestsWorkspace.archiveExpired: This archive's download window has expired. Create a new export for an up-to-date copy.
dataRequestsWorkspace.archiveUnavailable: The archive for this record is unavailable. Create a new export so the system can generate a valid file.
dataRequestsWorkspace.archiveFailed: The archive could not be created. You can try creating a new export.
dataRequestsWorkspace.downloadError: The archive is unavailable or its download window has expired.
dataRequestsWorkspace.confirmPageDescription: Final verification before your account identity and server-side data are permanently removed.
dataRequestsWorkspace.confirmWarning: After continuing, your session will close and the account cannot be recovered.
dataRequestsWorkspace.confirmTokenMissing: The confirmation link is incomplete or no longer valid.
dataRequestsWorkspace.deletionFailed: Deletion could not be processed. Sign in again if recent authentication is required.
